plain:

When everybody cared, like when everybody winning

They wanna take the church, probably wanna build a prison
So really what it's giving? Villian
The future got me fighting for the feeling
You see my people moving cause they able and they willing
To stand up like a building for these buildings got me building
Pillar of my era and I'm daring them to kill him
No reason to be scared, be prepared for the healing
And leave it up to God, oh yeah, he made me in his image
